mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flow_attachment (flow_apply_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, uploaded_by, created_at) VALUES (#{flowApplyId}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{uploadedBy}, NOW())

INSERT INTO flow_attachment (flow_apply_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, uploaded_by, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.flowApplyId}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.fileUrl}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.fileType}, #{item.uploadedBy}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, flow_apply_id AS flowApplyId, file_name AS fileName, file_url AS fileUrl, file_size AS fileSize, file_type AS fileType, uploaded_by AS uploadedBy, created_at AS createdAt FROM flow_attachment WHERE flow_apply_id = #{flowApplyId}
